texto: Depression is not madness, it's just depression, the loser version, the low-energy response to bad stuff that happens in your life. When you're depressed, you think you're the only one to have ever tasted this kind of hurt. And that lonely self-regard brings with it its own painful pleasure.
explicacao: Citação de Ana Menéndez sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “Depression is not madness, it's just depression, the loser version, the low-energy response to ba…” articula reflexao, depression, madness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
